verdict_reason: 0 CRITICAL; 9 NEW WARN + 3 carry-forward WARN; 6 NEW INFO + 4 carry-forward INFO. Structural count 13 over budget of 0 (9 NEW + 4 carry-forward), but every NEW WARN is documentation catch-up — the shipped code is healthy. 5 of 9 NEW WARNs are projections of the same root cause: plan.md not amended for the new endpoints, indexes, and PostHog events landed in Sessions 15-16. Single coordinated edit pass resolves L1-001, L2-020, L2-021, L2-022, L3-020, L3-021, L3-022, L3-023, L3-024, L4-019, L5-013, L6-004 across plan.md (5 locations), spec.md (2 FRs + 1 AC), product-spec (3 small edits), tasks.md (1 header insert + 1 Paths fix), and 1 frontend patch (Edit button on review reading-view). Pattern continuation from Runs #2-#8: applied_split_with_override.

gate_override.reason: 0 CRITICAL findings; every NEW WARN is documentation catch-up — plan.md / spec.md / product-spec not amended for the Session 15-16 shipped code (9 new endpoints, sidecar pattern, Review.deleted_at index, 4 new PostHog events, drag-reorder UX). Material gaps: (1) FR-034/FR-035 missing in spec for US-D2/D3, (2) Review delete AC missing for US-C3, (3) US-C3 edit affordance not mounted on any live route (L6-004 — code exists, not wired). All resolvable in coordinated edit pass. Carry-forwards (L2-019, L3-017, L4-009, L6-002) remain user-deferred under existing dispositions. Sessions 15-16 themselves landed cleanly: 0 orphan files, every Must Have story has route + component + test evidence except US-C3 partial.

honest_assessment: Sessions 15-16 are healthier than the doc-drift count suggests. Code shipped clean (+62 tests for §8 reviews; +30 for §9 backlog; 592 backend pass / 3 skip; 11 frontend routes; zero orphan files). The drift is downstream: plan.md hasn't tracked the new endpoints / indexes / events that landed inline, and US-C3 edit is built but not surfaced. Both are recoverable in a single pass. The most material true gap is L6-004 (edit-review dialog needs ~10 lines to mount on the reading-view footer) — that's a code change, not a doc fix.
next_action: Continue to §10 Social graph + Feed (T101-T108). Re-run sync-verify after the next cluster lands.
